title: Implementing Monetary Policy in the Large Value Transfer System Environment - Bank of Canada
content:
## Implementing Monetary Policy in the Large Value Transfer System Environment
Originally published in January 1999 (revised, March 1999)
Final report: The framework for the Implementation of Monetary Policy in the Large Value Transfer System Environment
